description: Animated toast notifications with success, error, and info variants.
docs:
# Toast
Animated toast notifications with success, error, and info variants.
## Import
```tsx
import { useToast, ToastProvider } from "@/components/ui/toast";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<useToast variant="success" title="Changes saved" description="Your settings were updated successfully." />
```
## Props
- **variant** (string) — default: `"success"`: Variant
- **title** (string) — default: `"Changes saved"`: Title
- **description** (string) — default: `"Your settings were updated successfully."`: Description
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add toast
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/toast
```

meta.usageExample: <useToast variant="success" title="Changes saved" description="Your settings were updated successfully." />
